top_signals.title: Regulator wins decade-long pricing tussle with Pfizer
top_signals.summary: The UK competition watchdog has won permission to appeal in a case against US pharmaceutical giant Pfizer after a long-running legal battle over allegations of excessive pricing, overturning a previous decision by the Tribunal. The court said the Competition Appeal Tribunal (CAT), was “wrong to set aside the [Competition and Market’s Authority’s] decision” in relation to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
